payload.answer: Rewrite selected, but no new memory content was provided to store.

entity_resolution.reason: Input indicates the user selected 'Rewrite memory' but does not provide the rewritten/updated text.

details: No durable memory commit performed due to missing replacement content.

repair_options: Ask the user to provide the updated/replacement memory text.
Confirm what should be rewritten (what the new statement should be).
If the rewrite should keep the same content, clarify that explicitly to avoid unintended changes.
